feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Unable to return valid error msg from SO enh to BAPI/OData response in S/4HANA.
entry.content:
We are updating Sales Orders via OData,

where the call flow is: CPI → OData Service → DPC Extension Class → BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE

Inside this BAPI execution, business validations are implemented in EXIT_SAPMV45A_003 (sales order processing includes).When a validation fails: We raise a hard-coded error message

(MESSAGE e...)The message is available in SY-MSG*

Execution stops immediately BAPI RETURN table is NOT populated

As a result, DPC Extension cannot capture the error CPI receives no meaningful error message

 

This makes it impossible to propagate validation errors back to the external system.

Actual Behavior

Messages raised in EXIT_SAPMV45A_003:Appear only in SY-MSG*

Do not reach BAPI RETURN Cause silent failure from OData perspective 

No standard BAdI / enhancement clearly supports returning validation messages for this scenario.

entry.title: deploy config issue in BAS
entry.content:
HI Team,

I am getting deploy-config issue in my BAS when I am trying touse command npm run deploy-config and getting ERR_INVALID_ARG_TYPE error. I used the commands mentioned in note: 3763944, but still issue remains. Please help.

entry.title: F881 doesn´t work properly
entry.content:
Hi,

We are trying to retire an asset using transaction F881,but the result is not as expected

We are getting this error:AA816. Transaction type doesn´t exist

Best Regards,

entry.title: Note 3754927 S4CORE
entry.content:
HI team ,

 

Need to know the note 3754927  is applicable for S4CORE version 108 or not ?

entry.title: Is there any program to synch the ACDOCP cost element category 42 values to CO tables in S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hello SAP team,

We tried to transfer the values from ACDOCP to CO tables by using the program R_FINS_PLAN_TRANS_CO_S4H_2_ERP and we got the  error message.

entry.title: I'm Unable to delete PO line item due to supplier blocked
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

I am unable to delete a PO line item because the supplier is blocked. Is there any alternative way to delete the PO line item without unblocking the supplier?

Note: I encounter the same error when I try to block the status for the PO line items.

Regards,
Parasuram

entry.title: Inspection Type 04 with HU is active AND Inspection Type 08 + 09 are also active.
entry.content:
Inspection Type 04 with HU is active AND Inspection Type 08 + 09 are also active.

Show me error when I do Good Receipt : Change the inspection stock of material 0062 in QM only.

When I remove inspection type 08 and 09 from material master system allows me to do good receipt from production order; movement type 101.

which parameter I I need to include in customizing or material master to allow me works with inspection type 04 with Handling unit, Inspection Type 08 and 09 active in material master.

entry.title: Inspection Type 04 with HU is active AND Inspection Type 08 + 09 are also active.
entry.content:
Inspection Type 04 with HU is active AND Inspection Type 08 + 09 are also active.

Show me error when I do Good Receipt : Change the inspection stock of material 0062 in QM only.

When I remove inspection type 08 and 09 from material master system allows me to do good receipt from production order; movement type 101.

which parameter I I need to include in customizing or material master to allow me works with inspection type 04 with Handling unit, Inspection Type 08 and 09 active in material master.

entry.title: My Sales Overview : Sales Order Fulfillment Issue and in "Issues total by sold to party"
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Could you please provide a detailed explanation regarding the issues observed in the Sales Order Fulfilment card in SAP SD Fiori?

Specifically, we would like to understand the discrepancies or errors related to the following areas:

  • Order
  • Supply
  • Delivery

Also, at the time of searching information related to single customer, in "Issues total by sold to party" three additional customers are showing. Please explain.

entry.title: DBCOを使用したOracle への接続について
entry.content:
お世話になっております。

 DBCOを使用したOracle への接続について確認させてください。

 【対象】 S/4HANA 2022 / 2023 / 2025

 【質問】
上記対象からDBCO接続可能なOracleバージョンを確認したいです。

・技術的に接続可能な構成は存在するか
・SAPサポート対象か
・サポート対象外の場合、制限事項は何か 

参考となる資料などありましたらご教授いただけますでしょうか。

 

以上、よろしくお願いいたします。

entry.title: CJ20NでステータスをCMPLにできない
entry.content:
SAP担当者様
お世話になります。MEDの仙波です。

CJ20NでCMPLのステータスを入れようとしたところ、
KO020エラーが出てしまいました。
対応方法を教えてください。

仙波

entry.title: Hana DB Audit Policy
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We would like to know about the HANA DB audit policy as we want to create policy in our system. Could you please help us to set up the policy as per the guidelines.

Please let us know if there are not SAP Notes/ blogs which we need to follow.


Regards
Mahendra

entry.title: TTRTKCDS2 is not consistent Field TRANSPORTATIONORDERITEMUUID: key or index must not contain fields
entry.content:
DataStore object TTRTKCDS2 is not consistent and Field TRANSPORTATIONORDERITEMUUID: key or index must not contain fields 

Facing above error in BW when replicating CTRANSPORDITMDEX (C_TranspOrdItemAnlytsDEX )

entry.title: PI tolerance Warning Message During Count
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team, 

While performing physical Inventory count through RF, we are receiving tolerance group warning messages for every time the count is deviated from the actual book inventory.

While the Tolerance is within the limit, still the warning message appears every time and interrupting the counting process. Kindly suggest any solutions which can help us in preventing such warning messages during PI count. 

Error Message: Entered Value exceeds tolerance; check your count entry

Message Class: /SCWM/RF_DE066

entry.title: Direct Extract Option Not Available in T-Code S_ALR_87012277
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are unable to find the Direct Extract option in the standard transaction code S_ALR_87012277 in the PS4-100 system.

Could you please check and confirm whether this option is available in the system, or advise if any additional configuration or authorization is required to access it?

Thank you for your support.

Regards,

Megha S. Patil

entry.title: Periodenselektion nicht mehr möglich
entry.content: Im S4 System ist die Periodenselektion in S_ALR_87013015 nicht mehr vorhanden, im R3 war sie noch da.

entry.title: Free goods deletion flag unable to find the change logs
entry.content:
Issue: We are deleting the free goods condition records and changes are not captured in CDHDR and CDPOS

Is it standard functionality behavior or do we need to do any configuration related to the free goods.

entry.title: Experiencing change in layout after upgrade
entry.content:
After the upgrade, the standard WDA tiles are no longer opening in a new tab. Prior to the upgrade, clicking on a tile would open it in a new tab (except for the Home page). However, post-upgrade, the tile now opens in the same tab, replacing the Home screen.

We tried all steps as suggested in SAP support but nothing worked.Below are the steps we followed.

Open transaction /n/UI2/FLP_CUS_CONF for client‑specific settings or /n/UI2/FLP_SYS_CONF for system‑wide settings.

Locate the parameters NAVIGATION_GUI_INPLACE and NAVIGATION_WDA_INPLACE.

Set NAVIGATION_WDA_INPLACE = false (and optionally NAVIGATION_GUI_INPLACE = false) to force WDA tiles to open in a new browser tab (ex‑place). Setting the value to true will keep the navigation in‑place (same tab).

Save the changes, clear the browser cache and restart the Fiori Launchpad session 

Even after all these settings we have seen same behaviour.

Kindly check and confirm if any settings are missing on our end to restore the system behavior to how it functioned prior to the upgrade.

entry.title: CFDI Idoc Solution: Idoc not linked with billing document
entry.content:
Dear support-team,

usually outgouing Idocs are linked with the triggering document in SAP - for example:

Billing document triggers INVOICE02 Idoc. Outgoing Idoc is linked with billing document. You can see the link (or relationship)

  • in VF02/VF03 under Relationsships
  • WE02/WE05/BD87 under Relationships

For our mexicon company code we have customized the CFDI Idoc solution which also creates Idoc triggered by billing document. In this solution a different Idoc Typs is beeing used (MXCFDIREQ002). As we noticed this Idoc is not linked with the billing document as it is done for INVOIC02 Idocs.

Please provide information on how the Idocs for CFDI Idoc solution can be linked to the billing document.

Thanks in advance and best regards.
Alex Dürl

entry.title: CN72 is not capturing the ECP Data for PS Projects.
entry.content:
The current snapshot functionality available through transaction CN72 does not capture Easy Cost Planning (ECP) entries from the CKIS table.

To address this limitation, we are considering developing a custom program that extracts CKIS table entries and stores them in a custom Z-table, along with relevant date and timestamp information. 
This solution would enable us to maintain historical snapshots and support comparison with live data in Fiori reports.

We would appreciate your guidance on whether there are any standard SAP options available to capture snapshots of Easy Cost Planning (ECP) data.

If no standard solution exists, please confirm whether proceeding with the custom approach—capturing CKIS records along with date and timestamp in a Z-table—would be appropriate.
Additionally, we would like to highlight a concern regarding the potential growth of records in the snapshot table over time.

We would appreciate recommendations on how to efficiently manage data volume and ensure optimal performance as the dataset increases, Approx. Data Volume 1Million Records per Month.
with the Retention Period of 18Months to pull the data frequently and show the same in the Comparision Reports.
